title: Pest monitoring: visual lures
subtitle: Spremljanje škodljivcev: vizualna privabila
description: A practice abstract from the SmartProtect network outlining the use of colour and light-based visual lures to monitor pest insect populations in open field and greenhouse vegetable crops. It explains how hue, intensity, contrast, and light wavelength influence insect attraction and evaluates the selectivity and effectiveness of different trap types.
